component.name: Document Finder
component.summary: Find documents for AI conversational awareness

description.p: Document Finder searches open-access sources, downloads PDFs, EPUBs, HTML, and plain-text documents in parallel, and bundles them into AI-ready context with full-text BM25 search.
It is designed to help build conversational awareness for AI assistants by quickly assembling a focused, local library of source documents on a topic.

Linux hardening: more reliable "Show in folder" and "Erase app data," a fix for a library-folder mismatch on minimal installs without xdg-user-dirs, an opt-in Safe rendering mode for the WebKitGTK blank-window issue, and a fuller Flatpak (AppStream metadata, complete icon set, portal-based file dialogs).
